title: Payments on the Marketplace
excerpt: Any updates on payments? I heard there was something in the roadmap and we’re at a point where we need to understand what is coming before we build our own.

posts.author: boris (Boris Berenberg)
posts.cookedHtml: Any updates on payments? I heard there was something in the roadmap and we’re at a point where we need to understand what is coming before we build our own.

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @boris!

Great question, at this time payments are not something our team will be focusing on. Check out the FAQs section of our developers page here.

At this time, developers will be responsible for building out their own payment channels.

Hope this helps .

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @boris - We have a Stripe integration built for the Marketplace, but we’ve delayed making it available to other app developers while we re-platform our app. If Stripe payments is something you’d be interested in for your Marketplace app, let’s chat. I’ll send you a PM or you can book a time here: Book a call with Polished Geek: Do more with monday․com

~ Deb Cinkus
Product-certified Partner

posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
